name: arisehash
description: AriseHash — asisten AI untuk membuat aplikasi (frontend + backend dalam satu repo).

scripts.build: cd app && npm install && npm run build
scripts.db:setup: cd server && npx prisma db push --schema=prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate dev --schema=prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate:deploy: cd server && npx prisma migrate deploy --schema=prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../app && npm install && cd .. && npm install
